manager_notes: Always start from one shared task entry instead of a free-form chat request.
Do not assign implementation before scope, allowed files, and validation are explicit.
Prefer one active slice at a time; split oversized work before execution.
Treat CrewAI as an outer coordination layer, not a replacement for repo business logic.
Current objective: Validate local manager workflow

roles.name: Manager
roles.goal: Read the objective, choose the smallest valid next slice, assign work, and enforce boundaries.

roles.name: Builder
roles.goal: Implement the approved slice only within the manager-defined file boundaries.
deliverables: Notes about assumptions and touched files

roles.name: Tester
roles.goal: Validate the slice with the smallest meaningful checks and report regressions clearly.

roles.name: Documenter
roles.goal: Keep tasklist, claim, and change records aligned with the real implementation state.

tasks.title: Clarify scope and acceptance
tasks.summary: Manager translates the raw request into a bounded slice with explicit acceptance checks.
validation: Scope mentions what is out of bounds

tasks.title: Implement the smallest useful slice
tasks.summary: Builder changes only the files needed for the agreed slice.

tasks.title: Run verification
tasks.summary: Tester runs focused checks for the changed slice and reports pass/fail with evidence.

tasks.title: Sync task records
tasks.summary: Documenter updates task records to match the actual completed slice.
